subject: LU-12904 ldiskfs: Add ldiskfs support for linux 5.4

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Patch Set 1:

It looks like  Maloo has built this code with 4.17-rhel8 and 3.10-rhel7.7 series. 
No ldiskfs-5.4.0-ml.series series build here. I tried to build this code with Linux 5.4-rc8 but without success.
ln -s ../../ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches linux-stage/patches
ln -s ../../ldiskfs/kernel_patches/series/ldiskfs-5.4.0-ml.series linux-stage/series
cd linux-stage && quilt push -a -q

Uploaded patch set 2.

commit.subject: LU-12904 ldiskfs: Add ldiskfs support for linux 5.4
commit.message:
LU-12904 ldiskfs: Add ldiskfs support for linux 5.4

Linux 5.4 ext4 has some changes from 5.0 this
fixes up the ldiskfs patches to apply against 5.4
